title: Feature: OpenRouter Inference Integration — single-key access to 300+ open-source models via OpenAI-compatible API

steps.description: Add OpenRouter provider support to inference-gateway WASM module. Extend inference_provider table with openrouter-specific fields: supports_provider_preferences (bool), reports_actual_cost (bool). Add 'openrouter' as recognized provider_kind string in register_provider reducer validation. In complete_inference reducer, branch on provider_kind=='openrouter' to use the actual cost from response body (openrouter_cost_usd field) instead of computing token×rate. Add openrouter_cost_usd optional field to inference_response table.
steps.done_condition: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown succeeds for inference-gateway; register_provider accepts provider_kind='openrouter'; complete_inference uses openrouter_cost_usd when present

steps.description: Extend OpenAiCompatAdapter in hex-agent with OpenRouter specialization. Add openrouter_headers() method that injects HTTP-Referer and X-Title headers. Add openrouter_body_extensions() that injects provider.order/allow/deny preferences and route='fallback' for batch workloads. Add extract_openrouter_cost() that reads usage.cost from response JSON. The adapter detects OpenRouter via the base_url containing 'openrouter.ai' or an explicit provider_kind field. No new adapter file — extend existing hex-agent/src/adapters/secondary/openai_compat.rs.
steps.done_condition: OpenAiCompatAdapter sends OpenRouter-specific headers and body extensions; cost extracted from response; unit tests pass for header injection and cost extraction

steps.description: Add model discovery command to hex-cli: 'hex inference discover --provider openrouter'. Implementation in hex-nexus: GET https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models, parse response into Vec<ModelInfo> (id, context_length, pricing.prompt, pricing.completion, top_provider, supported_parameters). For each model, call register_provider reducer via SpacetimeDB or POST /api/inference/providers REST endpoint. Filter to models supporting 'tools' parameter. Add --filter flag for name/context-size filtering (e.g. --filter 'llama' --min-context 128000).
steps.done_condition: 'hex inference discover --provider openrouter' populates inference_provider table with models; --filter narrows results; models without tool_use support are excluded

steps.description: Wire OpenRouter secret through hex secrets vault. Add OPENROUTER_API_KEY to the recognized secrets list in hex-nexus. hex-nexus retrieves the key from vault when constructing OpenRouter requests. Key is passed to OpenAiCompatAdapter via the existing api_key field. Never log, store in SpacetimeDB, or include in error messages. Add 'hex secrets has OPENROUTER_API_KEY' check to inference discover command (fail-fast with helpful message if missing).
steps.done_condition: 'hex secrets set OPENROUTER_API_KEY sk-or-...' stores the key; hex-nexus retrieves it for OpenRouter requests; 'hex inference discover' fails with clear message if key missing

steps.description: Implement hex-nexus inference route support for OpenRouter. When hex-nexus picks up a queued inference_request with provider='openrouter', it: (1) retrieves OPENROUTER_API_KEY from secrets, (2) constructs request with OpenRouter headers/extensions via adapter, (3) POSTs to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions, (4) extracts actual cost from response, (5) calls complete_inference with openrouter_cost_usd. Handle OpenRouter-specific errors: 402 (insufficient credits), 429 (rate limit with Retry-After), 502 (upstream provider down — log which provider failed).
steps.done_condition: Inference request with provider='openrouter' completes end-to-end; actual cost recorded; 402/429/502 errors handled with appropriate status in inference_response

steps.description: Update fallback chains in hex-agent composition root and conversation loop. Extend ModelSelection enum with OpenRouter(String) variant. Update WorkloadRouter to include OpenRouter models in routing decisions: batch→OpenRouter(llama-4-scout)→MiniMax→Haiku, interactive→Sonnet→Opus→OpenRouter(deepseek-r1)→Haiku, code→Sonnet→OpenRouter(llama-4-maverick)→MiniMax. Add --provider openrouter CLI arg to hex-agent.
steps.done_condition: ModelSelection::OpenRouter variant compiles; fallback chain includes OpenRouter models; --provider openrouter selects OpenRouter adapter; auto mode routes batch to OpenRouter

steps.description: Integrate OpenRouter models into RL model selection engine (ADR-031). Expand the model pool in hex-agent/src/ports/rl.rs to accept OpenRouter(model_id) variants. Update reward signal calculation to use actual cost (from openrouter_cost_usd) instead of estimated cost. Add exploration bonus for newly-discovered OpenRouter models (encourage trying new models). Update the Q-table persistence to handle dynamic model IDs (not just fixed enum variants).
steps.done_condition: RL engine tracks Q-values for OpenRouter models; reward signal uses actual cost; Q-table persists dynamic model IDs; exploration bonus applied to new models

steps.description: Update TypeScript inference-discovery port and adapter. Add 'openrouter' to InferenceProvider union type in src/core/ports/inference-discovery.ts. Implement health check for OpenRouter: GET /api/v1/models with API key returns 200. Add OpenRouter endpoint auto-registration: when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is present, auto-register a single OpenRouter endpoint pointing to openrouter.ai/api/v1.
steps.done_condition: InferenceProvider type includes 'openrouter'; healthCheckAll validates OpenRouter connectivity; auto-registration works when key present

steps.description: Update dashboard InferencePanel to display OpenRouter data. In hex-nexus/assets/src/components/fleet/InferencePanel.tsx: (1) add 'OpenRouter' badge with distinct color to provider column, (2) show full model ID (e.g. meta-llama/llama-4-maverick) in model column, (3) display actual cost from openrouter_cost_usd when present, (4) add model discovery trigger button that calls hex inference discover. Requires cargo build for hex-nexus after asset changes.
steps.done_condition: InferencePanel shows OpenRouter badge, full model IDs, actual costs; model discovery button triggers endpoint; cargo build succeeds

steps.description: Integration tests: (1) register OpenRouter provider via reducer, submit inference request, verify headers and body extensions, (2) model discovery populates table with real OpenRouter models (requires API key in CI or mock), (3) budget enforcement with actual cost — submit requests until budget exceeded, (4) fallback chain — mock OpenRouter 502, verify fallback to MiniMax, (5) RL reward signal uses actual cost not computed cost. Run hex analyze to verify no boundary violations.
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass; hex analyze reports no boundary violations; budget enforcement with actual cost works correctly

mergeOrder: step-1, step-4 parallel (WASM module + secrets — independent tier 0)
step-1 → step-2, step-3 parallel (adapter extension + model discovery — both tier 1)
step-1 + step-2 + step-4 → step-5 (nexus route — needs WASM, adapter, secrets)
step-5 → step-6, step-9 parallel (fallback chain + dashboard — tier 3)
step-5 + step-6 → step-7 (RL integration — needs route + fallback chain)
step-6 + step-7 + step-8 + step-9 → step-10 (integration tests — all features)

riskRegister.risk: OpenRouter API changes — model list format or cost reporting may change without notice
riskRegister.mitigation: Pin to /api/v1 endpoints; version-check response schema; degrade gracefully if cost field missing (fall back to token×rate calculation)

riskRegister.risk: Latency overhead — extra hop through OpenRouter adds 50-100ms per request
riskRegister.mitigation: Use OpenRouter only for batch/non-interactive workloads by default; direct Anthropic for user-facing interactions

riskRegister.risk: Cost estimation inaccuracy during request — budget check happens before request, but actual cost known only after
riskRegister.mitigation: Pre-flight budget check uses estimated cost (token count × published rate); post-flight updates with actual cost; slight overrun possible but bounded by single-request cost

riskRegister.risk: Model availability churn — OpenRouter models appear/disappear as upstream providers change
riskRegister.mitigation: Model discovery is idempotent and can run on a schedule; RL engine handles unavailable models by zeroing their selection probability after N failures

riskRegister.risk: Q-table bloat — dynamic OpenRouter model IDs could grow the RL state unboundedly
riskRegister.mitigation: Prune Q-table entries for models not seen in last 30 days; cap at 50 active model entries

successCriteria: hex inference discover --provider openrouter populates inference_provider table with ≥20 tool-capable models
End-to-end inference request via OpenRouter returns response with actual cost recorded in inference_response
Budget enforcement correctly uses actual OpenRouter cost and rejects over-budget requests
RL model selection engine includes OpenRouter models in its pool and updates Q-values with actual cost
Dashboard InferencePanel shows OpenRouter badge, full model ID, and actual cost for OpenRouter requests
Fallback chain degrades gracefully when OpenRouter returns 502 (routes to MiniMax/Haiku)
hex analyze reports zero boundary violations after all steps merged
